========================================================================
             OFFICE STATIONERY MANAGER - DESKTOP SOFTWARE (GUI)
========================================================================

How to Run:
-----------
1. Extract ALL files from this ZIP archive to a folder of your choice
   (e.g., your Desktop or Documents folder).
2. Double-click "StationeryManager.exe" to launch the software.
3. The software will open directly in its own dedicated window.
4. No console, Command Prompt, or external browser (Chrome/Edge/Firefox)
   tab is opened. The server runs fully in the background.

How to Stop:
------------
* Simply close the Stationery Manager application window. 
* Closing the window automatically terminates the background server 
  and frees up the system port.

Database & Data Backup:
-----------------------
* The file "stationery.db" is your local database. It contains all 
  your user accounts, settings, items, and transactions.
* ALWAYS keep "stationery.db" in the same folder as "StationeryManager.exe".
* To back up your data, simply copy the "stationery.db" file to a safe place.
========================================================================
